m‚ĆĹ.task: {m‚ĆĹ} is the _emerald rune of reversal_ which reverses the order of the list on its right. The watchtowers report their heights in the list `v`. Recite them from last to first.

m‚ČĘ.task: {m‚ČĘ} is the _emerald rune of tally_ which counts how many items sit in the list on its right. The caravan hauls the crates listed in `l`. How many crates are there?

d‚ćī.task: {d‚ćī} is the _ruby rune of reshape_ which lays the items on its right into the shape on its left. Arrange the list `l` into a table of `2` rows and `3` columns.

l5.task: The way west is sealed. Reverse the list `l` to speak the closing word.
